_comment: static-ads-builder per-project config. Copied to <project-root>/<project-slug>/static-ads-builder/config.json on first run. Replace placeholders; never commit a real config to the agent folder.

$schema_hint.copy_language: fr | en. Language of on-ad copy (headline/subheadline). Image prompts are always English.
$schema_hint.funnel_stages: all | tofu | mofu | bofu | tofu,mofu | tofu,bofu | mofu,bofu. How the brief pool is distributed.
$schema_hint.product: Exact product name for the reference image, or empty for a generic product label.
$schema_hint.visual_style: Empty = auto-select a named style per brief. Or a slug from skills/visual-styles/REGISTRY.md to lock one style across all briefs.
$schema_hint.web_enrichment: off | exa | firecrawl | auto. Optional, non-blocking angle discovery before strategy.
$schema_hint.num_briefs: Size of the brief pool to generate (max 15). Gate 1 then selects a subset of 5 to 15 to render.
$schema_hint.default_model: fal-ai/nano-banana-2 (default) | openai/gpt-image-2 | fal-ai/nano-banana-pro. Confirmed again at Gate 2.
$schema_hint.default_resolution: 1K | 2K | 4K. Main cost lever. Confirmed again at Gate 2.
